2606.13598.title: Reward Modeling for Multi-Agent Orchestration
2606.13598.paper_summary: Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) built on Large Language Models (LLMs) require effective orchestration to coordinate specialized agents, yet training such orchestrators is hindered by limited supervision and high computational cost. We propose Orchestration Reward Modeling (OrchRM), a self-supervised framework for evaluating orchestration quality without human annotations. OrchRM leverages intermediate artifacts from multi-agent executions to construct win-lose pairs for Bradley-Terry reward model training. Unlike existing MAS test-time scaling and orchestrator training frameworks that rely on costly sub-agent rollouts, OrchRM operates directly at the orchestration level, enabling efficient and high-performing reward-guided orchestrator training and MAS test-time scaling. OrchRM improves training efficiency by up to 10x in token usage while improving MAS test-time scaling performance by up to 8% in accuracy. These gains consistently transfer across multiple domains, including mathematical reasoning, web-based question answering, and multi-hop reasoning, demonstrating orchestration-level reward modeling as a scalable direction for robust multi-agent orchestration. Code will be available at https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/OrchRM.
2606.13598.paper_summary_zh: 多代理系統 (MAS) 基於大型語言模型 (LLMs) 需要有效的協調來協調專門的代理，但訓練這樣的協調者受到有限監督和高計算成本的阻礙。我們提出了協調獎勵建模 (OrchRM)，這是一種自我監督框架，用於在沒有人工註釋的情況下評估協調質量。OrchRM 利用多代理執行中的中介產物來構建贏輸對，以進行 Bradley-Terry 獎勵模型的訓練。與現有的 MAS 測試時擴展和協調者訓練框架依賴高成本的子代理展開不同，OrchRM 直接在協調層面運作，使得獎勵引導的協調者訓練和 MAS 測試時擴展變得高效且表現優異。OrchRM 在令牌使用上提高了多達 10 倍的訓練效率，同時在準確性上提高了多達 8% 的 MAS 測試時擴展性能。這些增益在多個領域中持續轉移，包括數學推理、基於網路的問題回答和多跳推理，顯示協調層級的獎勵建模是一個可擴展的方向，以實現穩健的多代理協調。代碼將在 https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/OrchRM 提供。
2606.13598.author: King Yeung Tsang et.al.
2606.13598.authors: King Yeung Tsang, Zihao Zhao, Vishal Venkataramani, Haizhou Shi, Zixuan Ke, Semih Yavuz, Shafiq Joty, Hao Wang
